items.definition_en: A car is a road vehicle used for carrying people.
items.example_en: She drives her car to work every day.

items.definition_en: A truck is a large vehicle for carrying heavy things.
items.example_en: The truck delivered boxes to the shop.

items.definition_en: A motorcycle is a two-wheeled motor vehicle.
items.example_en: He likes to ride his motorcycle on weekends.

items.definition_en: A bicycle is a vehicle with two wheels you ride by pedaling.
items.example_en: Children often ride a bicycle to school.

items.definition_en: A taxi is a car you pay to travel in.
items.example_en: She took a taxi to the airport.

items.definition_en: A minivan is a small van for carrying people or goods.
items.example_en: The family used a minivan for their trip.

items.definition_en: A scooter is a small motorcycle with a step-through frame.
items.example_en: He goes to work on his scooter every morning.

items.definition_en: A coach is a large bus for travelling long distances.
items.example_en: We took a coach to visit another city.

items.definition_en: A pickup truck is a small truck with an open back.
items.example_en: They loaded the boxes onto the pickup truck.

items.definition_en: A fire engine is a special truck used by firefighters.
items.example_en: The fire engine arrived quickly at the scene.

items.definition_en: A police car is used by police officers for work.
items.example_en: A police car stopped by the store.

items.definition_en: An ambulance is a special vehicle that carries sick or hurt people.
items.example_en: The ambulance came very fast.

items.definition_en: A van is a road vehicle used for carrying goods or people.
items.example_en: The van was full of packages.

items.definition_en: A tractor is a strong vehicle used on farms.
items.example_en: The farmer drove the tractor across the field.

items.definition_en: A delivery van is used for bringing goods to people.
items.example_en: A delivery van brought our new fridge today.

items.definition_en: A motorhome is a large vehicle where people can live or travel.
items.example_en: They drove their motorhome across the country.

items.definition_en: A roadster is a small, open car that is fun to drive.
items.example_en: He bought a new roadster for summer trips.

items.definition_en: A school bus takes children to and from school.
items.example_en: The school bus arrives at 8 am every day.

items.definition_en: A limousine is a long, fancy car for special events.
items.example_en: They hired a limousine for the wedding.

items.definition_en: A jeep is a small strong car that can drive on rough roads.
items.example_en: They drove a jeep through the forest.
